global_constraints.description: Phase 8 must not modify Hermes core files.
Phase 8 must not generate source patches.
Future runnable integration must be gated by HERMES_EXT_* feature flags.
Any future integration must honor HERMES_EXT_KILL_SWITCH.
Shadow harness validation must precede any native Hermes integration.

constraints.description: Do not modify Hermes core source files.
Do not import or execute Hermes runtime from integration spec.
Do not read .env, API keys, tokens, or provider credentials.

metadata.phase7_hint: Future integration should prefer external provider wrapper or feature-flagged sidecar.
metadata.phase7_reason: Provider-like symbol detected by static AST scan.

entries.rationale: Candidate may be represented by an external wrapper, but the source file remains untouched.
entries.rollback_strategy: Disable HERMES_EXT_ENABLED or enable HERMES_EXT_KILL_SWITCH; delete only hermes_ext-generated shadow state; never modify Hermes native state.
